channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Bible's Stance on Technology: A Growing Industry
item.description: Christian tech companies are experiencing a growth spurt, with millions of downloads and in-app purchases. Bible sales are up 22% year-over-year, and Christian apps are riding the surge of popularity.
item.dc:creator: Henry Chandonnet, Fast Company

item.title: Nvidia’s Run:ai acquisition waved through by EU
item.description: Nvidia will face no objections to its plan to acquire Israeli AI orchestration software vendor Run:ai Labs in Europe, after the European Commission gave the deal its approval Friday.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Amazon workers are striking at multiple delivery hubs. Here's what you should know
item.description: Amazon workers affiliated with the Teamsters union continued a strike Friday at seven of the company's delivery hubs just days before Christmas.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Scholz dismisses Musk's assertion that only a far-right party can 'save' Germany
item.description: BERLIN (AP) — Chancellor Olaf Scholz on Friday dismissed an assertion by Elon Musk that only a far-right party can “save Germany,” but said that freedom of opinion "also goes for multibillionaires.” Germany is expected to vote in an early election on Feb.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Need a Mac VPN? Norton VPN just got a serious upgrade that you'd expect it already had
item.description: A kill switch feature finally lands on Norton's macOS app, and the provider is also expected to add it to its iPhone VPN soon. Here's all you need to know.
item.dc:creator: chiara.castro@futurenet.com (Chiara Castro), TechRadar

item.title: Hisense's Saturn wireless Dolby Atmos speakers could be a huge hit, based on the last Hisense soundbar I reviewed
item.description: Hisense reveals a Dolby Atmos speaker system as a wireless alternative to a soundbar – and it looks set to take on the Sony Bravia Quad.
item.dc:creator: james.davidson@futurenet.com (James Davidson), TechRadar

item.title: Google Photos Quick Edit Feature Leaked: What It Means for Users
item.description: Google is testing a new feature in Google Photos called Quick Edit, which allows users to apply last-minute touch-ups to images before sharing them with others. Find out what this means for Android device owners and when it might be released.
item.dc:creator: jamie.richards@futurenet.com (Jamie Richards), TechRadar

item.title: Never need an EV charging station again with these rooftop solar power panels
item.description: An inventor designed rooftop solar panels for a Tesla that draws solar energy while the car is parked, adding travel mileage without plugging in.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: The AI journey to discovery and achieving IT mastery
item.description: What if artificial intelligence (AI) could prevent 1,000 potential outages and improve IT service health and delivery by more than 75%? IT teams would sleep better, but that’s just the start.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Salt Typhoon: US cybersecurity watchdog urges switch to Signal-like messaging apps
item.description: Using only end-to-end encrypted apps is CISA's main security tip to secure your mobile communication in the wake of the biggest telecom attack in US history.
item.dc:creator: chiara.castro@futurenet.com (Chiara Castro), TechRadar

item.title: Marjorie Taylor Greene open to Musk for Speaker
item.description: Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene (R-Ga.) said Thursday she would be open to supporting Elon Musk for House Speaker, an idea proposed by other Republicans as Congress faces a government shutdown Friday night. Musk railed against the continuing resolution (CR) negotiated by Speaker Mike Johnson (R-La.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, The Hill

item.title: Elon Musk considers funding Nigel Farage's populist party, a move that could shake up UK politics
item.description: LONDON (AP) — It’s a photo that sent a tremor through British politics: Elon Musk flanked by British politician Nigel Farage and a wealthy backer, in front of a gilt-framed painting of a young Donald Trump.
item.dc:creator: JILL LAWLESS, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Ireland embraced data centers that the AI boom needs. Now they're consuming too much of its energy
item.description: Dozens of massive data centers are consuming more electricity than all of the urban homes in Ireland and starting to wear out the warm welcome that brought them here.
item.dc:creator: Matt O'Brien, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Data on animal movements help Hungarian researchers create a swarm of autonomous drones
item.description: BUDAPEST, Hungary (AP) — Moving in a dense cloud, like throngs of people walking across a crowded public square, 100 drones maneuver through the night sky in Hungary's capital, the result of over a decade of research and experimentation that scientists believe could change the future of unmanned fli
item.dc:creator: JUSTIN SPIKE, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Homeland Security gets its very own generative AI chatbot
item.description: In today's Federal Newscast, Homeland Security has rolled out its own generative AI chatbot, now available to roughly 19,000 employees. The post Homeland Security gets its very own generative AI chatbot first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Eric White, Federal News Network

item.title: Network jobs watch: Hiring, skills and certification trends
item.description: Network and infrastructure roles continue to shift as enterprises adopt technologies such as AI-driven network operations, multicloud networking, zero trust network access (ZTNA), and SD-WAN.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: How to work with text colors on Linux
item.description: When you list files on the Linux command line, many of the file names show up in colors, as you’ve probably noticed. The colors used depend on the file types. For example, the names of directories will show up in a blue font.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Musk and Trump are viewed roughly the same by Americans, an AP-NORC poll finds
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Elon Musk, clad in tuxedo and black tie, took the stage at President-elect Donald Trump's Mar-a-Lago resort shortly after the election with all the swagger of the winning candidate himself. “The public has given us a mandate that could not be more clear, the clearest mandate.
item.dc:creator: THOMAS BEAUMONT, SARAH PARVINI and AMELIA THOMSON-DEVEAUX, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: 12 Android tips you shouldn’t miss from 2024
item.description: Ah, the holidays. No matter what manner of winter celebration you prefer (I’m a Festivus man myself), late December is a fine time for kickin’ back and collecting your thoughts for the coming year.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Build a server-side web app with .NET, C#, and HTMX
item.description: There are many stacks on the server side and one of the most longstanding and capable ones is the .NET platform using C#. .NET is broadly comparable to the Java platform, and over the years, the two have been competitors and mutual influencers. Each draws inspiration from the other.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Cisco grabs SnapAttack for threat detection
item.description: Cisco is acquiring threat-detection startup SnapAttack for an undisclosed amount as it continues to expand its security portfolio.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: EU investigates TikTok over Romanian presidential election safeguards
item.description: LONDON (AP) — European Union regulators said Tuesday they're investigating whether TikTok breached the bloc's digital rulebook by failing to deal with risks to Romania's presidential election, which has been thrown into turmoil over allegations of electoral violations and Russian meddling.
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Fox News AI Newsletter: Chatbot's deadly prompt
item.description: Stay up to date on the latest AI technology advancements and learn about the challenges and opportunities AI presents now and for the future.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Court denies TikTok's request to halt enforcement of potential US ban until Supreme Court review
item.description: A federal appeals court on Friday left in place a mid-January deadline in a federal law requiring TikTok to be sold or face a ban in the United States, rejecting a request made by the company to halt enforcement until the Supreme Court reviews its challenge of the statute.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Warning: This fake PayPal email scam is everywhere right now
item.description: Fraudsters are sending people bogus invoices through PayPal as part of a sneaky scam that is going around; here's how to protect yourself from being fooled.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
